properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v1 v1 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Light the coal Fan the flame Passion for Your holy name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Fire of God consume our souls No matter where we are or were we go Fire of God consume our souls tonight :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I just wanna burn with a love so pure A passion for Your name with Your flame in my soul I just wanna burn with a love so pure tonight I just wanna burn with a love so pure A passion for Your name with Your flame in my soul I just wanna burn with a love so pure tonight Fire of God consume our souls No matter where we are or were we go Fire of God consume our souls tonight
